task_completion.description: Verify the Flight Crew View app is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Flight Crew View app interface is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the flight search interface is accessed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A search bar or flight search tab is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify 'DL400' is entered into the search field.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'DL400' is typed into the flight search input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the search results screen for 'DL400' is displayed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The screen shows the search results for 'DL400', either listing the flight details or showing a 'not found' message due to schedule changes.

task_completion.description: Verify a tracking alert is enabled for DL400 (if the flight was found).
task_completion.visual_evidence: A toggle, button, or icon indicating an active alert, notification, or tracking status (e.g., 'track', 'alert', 'follow', 'notify') is enabled for flight DL400. Note: If the flight was explicitly not found on the results screen, this step should be considered satisfied if the agent successfully navigated to the empty search result screen for 'DL400'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Flight Crew View app.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show the native GUI of the Flight Crew View app, not a web browser searching for the flight or a text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use terminal commands to bypass UI interaction.
integrity.visual_evidence: There are no terminal windows or command-line interfaces used to artificially trigger intents or notifications.

integrity.description: Verify the search and alert actions were performed via the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The search query and alert toggles appear as natural UI elements within the app, not as pasted text in an unrelated application.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target app is Flight Crew View (com.robert.fcView). The target flight is Delta Air Lines flight DL400. The app supports notifications and schedule sharing (keywords: track, alert, follow, notify, watching). If DL400 is not found due to schedule changes, reaching the search result screen for 'DL400' is the expected fallback behavior and should be awarded full points.
